mapper.select: select b.b_index, b.b_reg_date, b.b_update_date, b.b_subject, b.b_title, b.b_contents, b.b_hits, b.b_like_user_index, b.b_inactive, u.user_index, u.user_nickname, r.b_reply_cnt from ${b_name} b join t_user u on b.user_index=u.user_index left join(select b_index,count(r_index) as b_reply_cnt from ${r_name} where r_inactive=0 group by b_index) as r on b.b_index=r.b_index where b.b_inactive = 0 order by 1 desc limit #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: insert into ${b_name}(user_index, b_title, b_contents, b_files) values(#{user_index}, #{b_title}, #{b_contents},#{b_files})
mapper.select: select b.b_index,b.b_reg_date,b.b_update_date,b.b_subject,b.b_title,b.b_contents,b.b_hits,b.b_like_user_index,b.b_inactive,b.b_files,u.user_index,u.user_nickname from ${b_name} b join t_user u on b.user_index=u.user_index where b.b_index=#{b_index};

select b.b_index,b.b_reg_date,b.b_subject,b.b_title,r.b_reply_cnt from ${b_name} as b left join(select b_index,count(r_index) as b_reply_cnt from ${r_name} where r_inactive=0 group by b_index) as r on b.b_index=r.b_index where b_inactive=0 order by 1 desc limit 0,6
